## Summary

- What changed?
- Why does it improve the repository?

## Change type

- [ ] README or documentation only
- [ ] Paper text or figure wording
- [ ] Analysis code or figure generation
- [ ] Experiment pipeline or prompt logic
- [ ] Reproducibility / packaging / CI

## Validation

- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] `make paper-smoke`
- [ ] `make release-check` (required if analysis, figures, or paper-facing numbers changed)
- [ ] Not run, with reason explained below

## Paper-artifact alignment

- [ ] Any claim changed in text is reflected in the current artifacts
- [ ] Any changed figure/caption is supported by the regenerated outputs
- [ ] If the change weakens an earlier narrative, the text was updated accordingly

## Notes for reviewers

- Anything non-obvious to look at?
- Any follow-up work intentionally left out?
